name: The Spacebound, Long-lived, Augmented, Digital Builder
prompt: Leonardo da Vinci's Vitruvian Man, classical pose: a single androgynous figure skewing slightly masculine, inscribed in circle and square, arms extended horizontally to touch the circle's edges, legs slightly apart. Ink anatomical study on aged parchment, sepia tones, centered, symmetrical. Flat chest, medium-short hair, defined but restrained musculature. A single classical fig leaf covers the pelvis, modestly concealing the entire groin area — no anatomical detail visible beneath it, only smooth skin on either side of the leaf. The figure is an adult in good condition — face neutral, hair dark, skin clean. One hand grips a sculptor's chisel, the other grips a drafting compass — tools of making. A soft translucent cyan glow of a brain and filament neurons is visible through the skull at the crown. Within the circle behind the figure: a deep starfield with a distant ringed planet. A translucent cyan wireframe silhouette of the same figure stands directly behind in the identical pose — a digital ghost. Renaissance anatomical manuscript aesthetic, minimal marginalia, clean and quickly readable, 1:1 square composition.
